name: Sweet and Sour Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the green bell pepper after seeding it.
2. Prepare the Basic Meatball recipe as directed in Recipe 12 and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, mix the cornstarch and brown sugar until combined.
4. Stir in the pineapple (with no-citrus syrup), soy sauce, and vinegar. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils.
5. Add the cooked meatballs to the skillet; cover and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Stir in the chopped green bell pepper; cover and simmer until the pepper is crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
7. Serve.
